expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui Dialog components (DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter)
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-13: imports AlertDialog variants from @/components/ui/alert-dialog. AlertDialog is a shadcn/ui dialog component appropriate for confirmations.

expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui Popover components (Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent)
expectations.evidence: Line 15: imports Popover from '@base-ui/react/popover' — uses RAW Base UI Popover instead of shadcn/ui wrapper. Uses Popover.Root, Popover.Trigger, Popover.Portal, Popover.Positioner, Popover.Popup pattern directly.

expectations.text: Does NOT import directly from @base-ui/react for Dialog or Popover
expectations.evidence: Line 15: import { Popover } from '@base-ui/react/popover' — direct Base UI import

expectations.text: Includes proper accessibility attributes or relies on shadcn's built-in a11y
expectations.evidence: Line 37: aria-label on popover trigger, Popover.Title/Popover.Description for semantic structure, AlertDialog provides built-in a11y

expectations.text: Has Cancel and Confirm action buttons in the dialog
